title: (Bullish Signal) BLFS, Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend on November 12, 2020.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Over the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that BLFS's AroonUp green line (see chart) is above 70, while the AroonDown red line is below 30. When the green line goes above 70 while the red line stays below 30, this is an indicator that the stock could be poised for a strong Uptrend. For traders, this could mean going long the stock or exploring call options in the next month. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 246 similar cases, 221 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 90%. Current price $31.67 is above $28.94 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 10/13/20 - 11/12/20, the price experienced a +15% Uptrend. During the week of 11/05/20 - 11/12/20, the stock enjoyed a +2% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/9am5rr7ng1z51.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=582f0e07d47e8c032775c8dfe8c579c20e180bfc

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on October 22, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on BLFS as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 85 of 100 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for BLFS just turned positive on November 03, 2020. Looking at past instances where BLFS's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in  42 of 47 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 89%.

Following a +3.18% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where BLFS advanced for three days, in 255 of 289 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.
